title: Settings
description: Manage your profile and shared group options in one place.
personalDescription: Preferences that only apply to your user.
appearanceDescription: Choose how you want to view the app.
foodIntolerancesDescription: Add allergies, intolerances or foods you prefer to avoid.
groupDescription: Manage what you share with other people.
groupOptionsDescription: Define which meals are planned in shared menus.
inviteDescription: Share the code or add a pending email.
joinDescription: Enter a code to switch to a shared group.
leaveDescription: When you leave, a new personal group will be created for your user.
ownerOnly: Only the group administrator can change this option.
membersEmpty: There are no visible people in the group yet.
leaveConfirmDescription: You will stop seeing and editing this group's shared menus. A personal group will be created for you.
